Description: DB schema completion, API conventions, frontend data layer and shared UI primitives that everything else depends on.

Create polymorphic votes table (votable_type/votable_id) linked to users; migration + Vote model.

Acceptance criteria:
- votes table with user_id FK and polymorphic votable columns.
- Unique constraint on (user_id, votable_type, votable_id).
- Vote model with morphTo relation; User/Thread/Comment relations wired.
- migrate runs clean.

Create follows table (user follows a thread) + Follow model.

Acceptance criteria:
- follows table with user_id and thread_id FKs, unique (user_id, thread_id).
- Follow model + relations on User and Thread.
- migrate runs clean.

Add edited_at (nullable timestamp) to threads and comments; add deleted_by FK to support tombstone (deleted by user vs moderator).

Acceptance criteria:
- Migration adds edited_at to threads and comments.
- Migration adds nullable deleted_by (FK users) to threads and comments.
- Soft deletes remain intact; migrate runs clean.

Define a single success/error JSON envelope, validation error format, and pagination meta. Create base API Resource classes (ThreadResource, CommentResource, ForumResource, UserResource). Document in backend README.

Acceptance criteria:
- Documented response shape for success, error, validation error, and paginated lists.
- Resource classes return the documented shape and are used by existing read endpoints.
- Short README section the frontend can rely on.

Run migrate:fresh with all schema fixes; update seeders for new columns/tables incl. sample votes/follows.

Acceptance criteria:
- migrate:fresh --seed succeeds from clean DB.
- Seeders populate sample votes and follows.
- No orphaned FKs; existing seeded data still loads.

Remove USE_MOCK, add a data-fetching wrapper over lib/api.js (React Query or fetch hooks), scaffold typed hooks (real useForums).

Acceptance criteria:
- USE_MOCK removed; forums sidebar fetches from /api/forums.
- Central hook layer with loading/error handling.
- CSRF/session cookie flow preserved.

Reusable Avatar component using imageUrl with size variants.

Acceptance criteria:
- Renders user image; size props (sm/md/lg).
- Graceful handling when image fails to load.
- Storybook-style usage documented in the component file.

Accessible three-dots dropdown menu (keyboard nav, Escape, outside-click close).

Acceptance criteria:
- Opens/closes on click; closes on outside click and Escape.
- Keyboard navigable; ARIA roles set.
- Accepts arbitrary menu items via props.

Reusable Modal/Dialog and Toast/notification primitives.

Acceptance criteria:
- Modal traps focus, closes on Escape/backdrop.
- Toast supports success/error, auto-dismiss.
- Both usable from any page via a provider or portal.

Summary: A10 Shared UI: TimeAgo + UpvoteButton + Badge
Description:
TimeAgo (Macedonian relative time), presentational UpvoteButton (count + active state, no API), Featured Badge.

Acceptance criteria:
- TimeAgo renders MK relative strings.
- UpvoteButton shows count + active/inactive, emits onClick prop.
- Badge renders Featured/label variants.
Wire real read API for the feed, forum pages and sidebar; remove hardcoded/mock data.

Implement cross-forum feed with sort (Trending/Popular/New/Featured), time window, pagination.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/feed returns paginated threads per A4.
- Supports sort and time-range query params.
- Trending is default; matches spec fields.

ForumController: sort sidebar forums by activity in last 7 days; school forums grouped by city.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/forums orders topic forums by recent activity.
- School forums grouped by city, alphabetical within city.
- Response follows A4 shape.

Add pagination to threads in a single forum.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/p/{slug} returns paginated threads with meta.
- Respects sort/time filters.

Presentational card: forum icon/name, author+avatar, time, title, body preview, comment+upvote counts, Featured tag.

Acceptance criteria:
- Renders all spec fields from props.
- Uses Avatar (A7), TimeAgo/Badge (A10).
- No direct API calls.

ForumBanner + ForumFilters (sort/time dropdowns emit state) + thread list using B4.

Acceptance criteria:
- Banner shows icon/name/description from props.
- Filters emit selected sort/time via callbacks.
- Empty state rendered when no threads.

Summary: B6 Wire sidebar + feed to API
Description:
Connect sidebar (Thematic/School) and /feed to /api/forums and /api/feed; filters drive query params; loading/empty/error states.

Acceptance criteria:
- Sidebar and feed render live data.
- Changing filters refetches with correct params.
- Loading, empty and error states handled.

Connect /p/[slug] to ForumController@show with pagination + filters.

Acceptance criteria:
- Forum page renders live threads.
- Pagination and filters work end-to-end.
Create new discussions: POST /threads, the /new page, rich text editor and attachments.

Auth-only thread creation with validation.

Acceptance criteria:
- forum_id required and must exist; title 3-200 chars; body optional.
- Returns created thread as A4 resource.
- Rejects unauthenticated requests (401).

Summary: C2 Attach media to thread + DOC support
Description:
Link uploaded media to a thread via thread_attachments (image/file/link/video); extend MediaController mimetypes to allow DOC/DOCX.

Acceptance criteria:
- Thread create accepts attachment references and persists thread_attachments.
- MediaController accepts DOC/DOCX (size limit per spec 25MB).
- Attachment type stored (image/file/link/video).

Forum picker (Topic/School grouped, shows forum description), title field, validation states, submit disabled until valid.

Acceptance criteria:
- Forum picker lists grouped forums with description preview.
- Title validation (3-200) shown inline.
- Submit disabled until form valid.

Clean SSR-safe TipTap editor: Bold, Italic, ordered/bullet lists, link, code block, quote; outputs HTML/JSON.

Acceptance criteria:
- Toolbar with all listed formatting actions.
- No SSR/hydration errors in Next.js.
- Emits serializable content via prop.

Image upload, file (PDF/DOC) upload, link insert with preview placeholder, video embed (YouTube/TikTok) by URL.

Acceptance criteria:
- Users can attach images and files in the editor.
- Link and video-embed insertion UI present.
- Emits attachment metadata for submit.

Connect /new to POST /api/threads + media upload; redirect to created thread.

Acceptance criteria:
- Submitting creates a thread and attachments via API.
- On success redirects to the new thread detail page.
- Validation/errors surfaced to the user.
Thread detail page and full comment system (nested replies, sorting).

Increment views; return full post + nested comments; comment sort param (Best/Newest/Oldest).

Acceptance criteria:
- View count increments on show.
- Returns nested comment tree per A4.
- Supports sort=best|newest|oldest.

POST comment (top-level + reply via parent_id) with validation; returns resource.

Acceptance criteria:
- Auth-only; content required.
- parent_id optional; validated to belong to same thread.
- Returns created comment as A4 resource.

/p/[slug]/[id]: main post (rich content + attachments), author block (avatar, pseudonym + school), meta (time, views, counts).

Acceptance criteria:
- Renders post content and attachments.
- Author block shows avatar + pseudonym + school.
- Meta row shows time, views, comment and upvote counts.

Nested replies with indentation + left line, collapse/expand, per-comment action row, Best/Newest/Oldest header.

Acceptance criteria:
- Renders arbitrarily nested replies with visual indentation.
- Collapse/expand branches.
- Sort header emits selected order.

Add-a-comment field and per-comment reply box with Comment button.

Acceptance criteria:
- Top-level comment box present.
- Reply box toggles under a comment.
- Emits content + parent_id via callback.

Connect thread detail + comment/reply posting to API; optimistic insert; comment sort.

Acceptance criteria:
- Detail page renders live data incl. view increment.
- Posting comment/reply updates the tree optimistically.
- Sort control refetches/reorders.
Upvote-only voting with toggle for threads and comments.

POST toggle vote for thread and comment; returns new count + has_voted; prevents double vote; auth-only.

Acceptance criteria:
- Toggling adds/removes a vote (idempotent per user).
- Returns updated count and has_voted.
- Unauthenticated returns 401.

Include upvotes_count and has_voted in Thread/Comment resources.

Acceptance criteria:
- Both resources expose upvotes_count.
- has_voted reflects current user.

Connect UpvoteButton (thread + comment) with optimistic toggle + auth gate (login prompt).

Acceptance criteria:
- Clicking toggles vote optimistically, reverts on error.
- Unauthenticated users are prompted to log in.
- Count stays in sync with server.
Author edit/delete for threads and comments with policies and tombstones.

PUT + DELETE with ThreadPolicy (author only); set edited_at; soft delete.

Acceptance criteria:
- Only author can edit/delete (policy enforced).
- edited_at set on update.
- Soft delete leaves comments intact with tombstone flag.

PUT + DELETE with CommentPolicy; edited_at; soft delete; tombstone (user vs moderator).

Acceptance criteria:
- Only author can edit/delete own comment.
- edited_at set on update.
- Deleted comment shows tombstone; replies remain.

Edit/Delete/Report/Share menu; edit-in-place forms for thread & comment; (уредено) badge; tombstone rendering.

Acceptance criteria:
- Menu shows contextual actions.
- Edit-in-place saves via callback.
- Edited badge and tombstone states render.

Connect edit/delete for thread & comment + policies (hide actions for non-authors).

Acceptance criteria:
- Edit/delete calls hit API and update UI.
- Non-authors do not see edit/delete.
- Errors surfaced via toast.
Full search across threads and comments with filters and highlighting.

Search threads (title/body) + comments; relevance/time filters; pagination; matched snippet/highlight data.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/search returns paginated results per A4.
- Supports relevance (Recent/Popular/Featured/New) and time filters.
- Returns snippet/highlight info.

Search bar with clear, live results, highlighted matches, relevance + time filter dropdowns, result cards.

Acceptance criteria:
- Live-updating results as user types.
- Matched keywords highlighted.
- Both filter dropdowns present with spec defaults.

Connect header search + /search live search (debounced) to API; highlight.

Acceptance criteria:
- Header search routes to /search.
- Debounced live queries hit API.
- Results/highlight render live.
Platform-wide recent comments page.

Latest comments across platform (author, forum, thread, time); pagination.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/recent returns paginated latest comments.
- Each item includes author, forum, thread ref, time.

Chronological list; each shows author/forum/thread/text/time/actions.

Acceptance criteria:
- Renders reverse-chronological list from props.
- Each row links to its thread.

Connect /recent to API and add sidebar Recent link.

Acceptance criteria:
- /recent renders live data.
- Sidebar Recent entry navigates to /recent.
Report content to moderators.

Use existing reports table; reason enum + other text; polymorphic thread/comment; auth.

Acceptance criteria:
- POST /api/reports stores report with reason + optional detail.
- Polymorphic to thread or comment.
- Auth-only.

Reason radio (Spam/Insult/Misinfo/Age/Other) + optional detail; success toast.

Acceptance criteria:
- Modal with reason options + optional text.
- Validates a reason is chosen.
- Shows success toast on submit.

Connect report modal to API from three-dots menu.

Acceptance criteria:
- Report action opens modal and submits to API.
- Success/error feedback shown.
Follow/unfollow a thread (visual in MVP).

Follow/unfollow thread; is_following in thread resource.

Acceptance criteria:
- POST follow / DELETE unfollow, auth-only.
- Thread resource exposes is_following for current user.

Follow button on thread detail with toggle states.

Acceptance criteria:
- Shows Follow/Following states.
- Emits toggle via callback.

Connect follow button to API.

Acceptance criteria:
- Toggling calls follow/unfollow endpoint.
- State reflects server, reverts on error.
@ mentions with autocomplete and highlighted rendering.

Endpoint for @autocomplete by username prefix.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/users/search?q= returns matching usernames + avatars.
- Limited/paginated result set.

Parse mentions on thread/comment save into mentions table; return mention data for rendering.

Acceptance criteria:
- On save, @username tokens resolved to users and stored.
- Response includes mention data for frontend rendering.

@ trigger dropdown in editor + colored mention rendering.

Acceptance criteria:
- Typing @ shows autocomplete from user search.
- Selected mention inserted and rendered in a distinct color.

Connect mention autocomplete + persistence.

Acceptance criteria:
- Autocomplete queries API live.
- Mentions persist and render on saved content.
Admin panel and manual moderation (reports queue, actions, sanctions, appeals).

users.type (user/moderator/admin); admin gate/middleware; seed an admin user.

Acceptance criteria:
- Role stored on users and enforced by middleware/gate.
- Admin routes reject non-admins (403).
- Seeder creates an admin account.

Admin endpoints: reports sorted by time/severity, with content context.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET reports list paginated, sortable.
- Detail returns reported content with context.
- Admin-only.

Ignore report / remove content (mod tombstone) / remove+warn / ban user; write sanctions.

Acceptance criteria:
- Actions update report status and content state.
- Removal sets moderator tombstone.
- Ban/warn writes a sanctions record.

User action history + sanctions/appeals endpoints (list sanctions, submit/resolve appeal).

Acceptance criteria:
- List sanctions per user.
- Create appeal for a sanction; admin resolve endpoint.
- History reflects moderation actions.

Admin panel: reports queue list + filters (admin-gated route).

Acceptance criteria:
- Lists reports with status/severity/time.
- Filter controls present.
- Route visible only to admins.

Report detail view with content context + action buttons (ignore/remove/warn/ban).

Acceptance criteria:
- Shows reported content in context.
- Action buttons for each moderation action.
- Confirmation for destructive actions.

User history view + sanctions list + appeal review UI.

Acceptance criteria:
- Shows a user's moderation history and sanctions.
- Appeal review controls present.

Connect admin panel to endpoints + route guard (admin only).

Acceptance criteria:
- All admin views render live data.
- Actions call endpoints and refresh state.
- Non-admins cannot access /admin.
Rate limiting, GDPR delete, responsive shell, i18n, lazy loading and remaining polish.

Throttle register/login, thread create, comment create.

Acceptance criteria:

- Returns 429 with clear message when exceeded.

Endpoint to delete user + their data; confirm cascade.

Acceptance criteria:

Virus scan hook (ClamAV/external) before media is published.

Acceptance criteria:

- Infected files rejected with error.

Hamburger + collapsible sidebar, responsive header.

Acceptance criteria:

- Header and feed usable at mobile breakpoints.
- No horizontal overflow.

Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Community Guidelines pages + links from onboarding/footer.

Acceptance criteria:

- Linked from onboarding and footer.

html lang=mk, translate remaining EN strings, remove dev stub routes (/, /imeNaRuta).

Acceptance criteria:

Lazy loading images/video + infinite scroll/pagination UI on feed/forum/search.

Acceptance criteria:

Configure Apple provider + enable button (if Apple developer account available).

Acceptance criteria:
